data.reasoningText: The user wants to run their tests with `dotnet test` and generate a TRX report. Let me look at the project files first and then run the tests.

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-06a9e967260e4e04b0f82ac6830bd43c && dotnet test --logger \"trx;LogFileName=TestResults.trx\" 2>&1", "description": "Run dotnet tests with TRX report", "initial_wait": 60}
